The '''''Indefatigable''''' was one of six [[Inexpugnable-class tactical command ship|''Inexpugnable''-class tactical command ships]] to serve the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2007-11-07 -->''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Handbook]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
